overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit covered walkways, passing vehicles, food vendor stalls, and a descent to a dark waterfront canal. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced lighting and reflective surfaces characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon overhead lighting

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the adjacent road to the right
large truck passes by on the road, temporarily occupying the right side view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, observing the passing traffic and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: overhead structure with cyan neon tube lighting running along the pedestrian walkway
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and glass facade
metal railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the vehicle road
large illuminated advertising screen on the side of a building
rectangular orange electrical or utility box situated on the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city at night. The camera moves forward under a cyan neon canopy while vehicles pass on the adjacent road separated by a metal barrier. Tall glass skyscrapers rise in the background, and digital billboards illuminate the scene with colorful advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor plaza under neon canopy

events.description: entering the food vendor area with illuminated stalls and standing pedestrians
slight slowing of pace while navigating around pedestrians near the food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the vendor area, passing by food stalls and standing NPCs on the right side

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall cart, facing the walkway

entered.detail: mobile food vendor cart with illuminated menu displays and serving counter
structural support column wrapped with bright cyan neon lighting
stationary food service counter with glowing signage and equipment

segments.scene_description: The walkway opens into a food vendor plaza beneath the same neon canopy. Several food stalls and carts line the right side, with NPC vendors and customers standing nearby. The camera continues forward through the moderate crowd, passing illuminated vendor counters and neon-lit structural pillars.

events.description: turning right at the building corner to head toward the waterfront stairs
ambient light decreases as moving away from the main neon canopy toward the darker stairwell area

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner of the building and approaching the stairway entrance, passing a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: corner of a modern building with dark facade and illuminated edges
tall vertical sign with pink and red neon lighting mounted on building wall
opening leading to descending stairs toward the water level
body of dark water visible at the lower level between buildings
concrete wall with red and white graffiti markings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at a building corner, leaving the vendor plaza behind. A vertical neon sign marks the wall as the path approaches a stairway entrance leading down to a waterfront canal. The lighting gradually dims as the main canopy recedes to the left, and graffiti-covered walls become visible on the left side.

events.description: beginning descent down stairs to the lower waterfront level
reaching bottom of stairs and transitioning to forward walking along the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: descending the stairs to the water level, then walking along the dark waterfront pathway

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the water canal with reflective surfaces
large industrial piping structure running along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a stairway to a lower waterfront level, transitioning from the bright neon canopy to a darker, enclosed canal walkway. The water canal is now immediately to the right, bordered by a metal railing. Industrial pipes and graffiti-covered walls line the path as the camera continues along the quiet, empty waterfront promenade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit pedestrian thoroughfare down into a dim, industrial waterfront canal. It begins under a cyan neon canopy on a covered walkway, moving past passing vehicles and towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by colorful digital billboards. As the path opens, the camera glides through a bustling food vendor plaza filled with illuminated stalls and crowds before turning right at a building corner. The scene then shifts as the bright canopy recedes and the lighting dims, leading the camera past graffiti-covered walls toward a stairway entrance. Finally, the camera descends to a lower level, transitioning into a dark, enclosed promenade bordered by a metal railing and a quiet water canal lined with industrial pipes.
